commitMessage:
fix(homepage): event card title single-line truncation (desktop+mobile) + Laylo iframe left offset

- Desktop small cards and mobile cards: ellipsis truncation via overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap
- Preserve typography and consistent card heights
- Laylo iframe (#laylo-drop-1nTsX): shift left by exactly 18px (left:-18px) without affecting container sizing
- Scoped change to TextUsSection only; behavior consistent across breakpoints

Build: vite production build passed locally
Security: UI-only changes, no backend impact.
